title: KeepSlots
description: Items you drop on death will automatically re-enter the slots they were in once you pick them up
body:
# KeepSlots
Are your players tired of having to re-sort their inventories after dying? KeepSlots will automatically put their items back into the same slots they were in before (if those slots are empty) after they pick up their items!

For support join the [Starshooter](https://discord.gg/dQGaXgxMpg) discord server.

## Server Hosting (Advertisement)
